---
title: "bonferroni"
generated: true
description: "Bonferroni family-wise error-rate correction."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.multiple_comparisons`](../nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:bonferroni -->
```python
bonferroni(p_values: Float[Array, 'n'], *, alpha: float = 0.05) -> Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:bonferroni -->
Bonferroni family-wise error-rate correction.

Scales each p-value by the number of tests `n` and clips to `1`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:bonferroni -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `p_values` | `Float` | `n` | — | Flat vector of `n` per-element p-values. |
| `alpha` | `float` | — | `0.05` | Target family-wise error rate defining the rejection mask. Default `0.05`. |

**Returns** `Tuple[Bool[Array, 'n'], Float[Array, 'n']]`. The rejection mask `p_adjusted <= alpha`. The Bonferroni-adjusted p-values $\min(n\, p, 1)$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:bonferroni -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
